assertionResults.title: Change Password persists; next unlock requires new password

steps.action: Unlock seeded returning profile and submit Change Password (old-password -> brand-new-password)
steps.observed: Submit accepted; subsequent lock flow enforced rotated credential

steps.action: Lock profile; attempt unlock with old password
steps.expected: Old password rejected with invalid-password error
steps.observed: Unlock modal remained open and body text showed 'decryption failed'

steps.action: Full page reload; retry unlock old then new
steps.expected: Old remains rejected; new still succeeds after reload
steps.observed: After reload to welcome, old failed again ('decryption failed'); new unlocked to dashboard

steps.action: Capture pre-lock state (dashboard/settings/policies + app state snapshot)
steps.expected: Profile name, relay order, and policy state are present before lock
steps.observed: deviceName alice-prime, relays [primal, damus] in order, Default policy 'Ask every time', peer manual_override respond.sign=unset

steps.action: Lock and unlock with current password
steps.expected: Session restores persisted profile + settings state
steps.observed: Returned to same dashboard route and profile after unlock

steps.action: Capture post-unlock state (settings/policies + app state snapshot)
steps.expected: Profile name, relay order, and relevant policy state persist
steps.observed: Pre/post app-state snapshots matched for activeProfile relays and policy sample (manual/effective policy unchanged); Ask-every-time still rendered

steps.action: Open settings → clear credentials modal and confirm clear
steps.expected: wipe_state called before runtime dispose and app navigates to welcome
steps.observed: clearCredentials log recorded wipe_state.invoked -> wipe_state.resolved -> runtime.dispose; route moved to /

steps.expected: Cleared profile absent from welcome list
steps.observed: Only Create/Import/Onboard CTAs remained; Unlock button absent

steps.expected: No profile records in IndexedDB and no sensitive session keys
steps.observed: profile-index=[] and profileRecordKeys=[]; session/local storage had no keys matching passphrase|share|seed|nsec

assertionResults.title: Terminology migration: "Rotate Share" → "Replace Share"

steps.action: Build app and perform DOM sweep across all /demo scenarios plus key routes
steps.expected: 0 rendered 'Rotate Share' matches and at least one rendered 'Replace Share'
steps.observed: DOM sweep tested 49 demo routes + extra routes; rotateShareCount=0 everywhere; replaceShareCount>0 on replace-share/dashboard settings surfaces

steps.action: Run strict source grep `rg -n "Rotate Share" src/`

assertionResults.issues: Strict grep failed with concrete offenders: src/__tests__/noRotateShareTerminology.test.ts lines 2, 27, 42, 44.

summary.result: Re-ran 4 assigned assertions: 3 pass, 1 fail (VAL-CROSS-009 strict source grep).

frictions.description: Dashboard remained in connecting/degraded state (no online peers) during lock/unlock persistence checks.
frictions.resolution: Validated composite persistence claims with observable state snapshots (profile name, relay order, policy state) across lock/unlock where feasible.
